blocks.title: Come Home to Yourself
blocks.body: Trauma-informed massage, sound healing, Ayurveda, and yin yoga — in a space built for slowing down.

blocks.title: Welcome to Spirit Seeds Wellness
blocks.body: Holistic healing in Lafayette — trauma-informed massage, sound healing, Ayurveda, and yin yoga.

blocks.title: Check Out What's New!
blocks.body: From live yoga classes and workshops to teacher trainings, retreats, and more — there's always something exciting on the horizon at Spirit Seeds. Tap below to explore our latest offerings and sign up.

cards.title: Integrative Healing
cards.description: Rejuvenate body and mind with relaxing touch.

cards.title: Sound Healing
cards.description: Align your energy with sacred sound frequencies.

cards.title: Private Yoga Sessions
cards.description: Build strength and serenity through movement.

cards.title: Live Yoga Classes
cards.description: Join a local class and practice with us — see the live schedule and book.

cards.title: Practice Online
cards.description: Practice at your own pace with these online tools.

cards.title: Follow Us on Social Media
cards.description: Stay connected and inspired with our community.

blocks.title: About
blocks.body: Spirit Seeds Wellness provides holistic healing for individuals healing CPTSD and seeking relief from emotional, physical, and spiritual pain. Melissa Carey offers rituals that address multiple layers of health and well-being.
